evidence: Line 171 only copies to canonical target, no mirror sync step for .claude/.gemini/.codex runtimes
fix: Add post-promotion mirror sync step or emit warning about manual sync required across all 4 runtime agent directories

evidence: Threshold values (thresholdDelta, minimumAggregateScore, minimumFixtureScore) scattered across config with no version tracking; promote-candidate.cjs line 92 has magic number fallback
fix: Centralize threshold definitions with schema versioning; add thresholdVersion field to config and score output

evidence: Dedup is packet-local via mutation-coverage.json signature field; no cross-packet registry to detect similar improvement proposals across different spec packets
fix: Add optional global dedup registry or emit cross-packet similarity warnings when mutation signatures match across packets

evidence: No validation that generated profile matches agent behavior pattern; profile derived mechanically from structure without sanity checks (rule count ranges, integration point expectations)
fix: Add profile sanity checks: validate rule count within expected ranges, integration points match agent type, permission alignment is coherent

evidence: No rubric version in score output; old scores claim new-rubric semantics after dimension definitions change; DIMENSION_WEIGHTS hardcoded in two places (lines 94-100 and config lines 47-53) with drift risk
fix: Add rubricVersion field to score output; reject comparisons across rubric versions; add weight drift detection between hardcoded constants and config

evidence: Sample run shows empty dimension arrays (lines 147-152: structural: [], ruleCoherence: [], integration: [], outputQuality: [], systemFitness: []) despite scoring completing; indicates data quality issue in reducer
fix: Add reducer validation that dimension scores are populated before accepting results; fail fast if dimension arrays are empty after scoring

evidence: No cross-runtime validation in promotion gates; improvement validated on one runtime (e.g., Claude) but not on others (Codex, Gemini, OpenCode); SKILL.md line 451 mentions runtime parity but no validation step
fix: Add optional cross-runtime validation step or document single-runtime limitation as known constraint in promotion rules
